name: DM Civil
message: DM Civil provides tailored, sustainable civil contracting solutions to many of Australia’s leading companies. A privately owned company established in 1976 by Reg Toohey, Tony Spanjers and his late brother Eric Spanjers. Since then, we have grown to be one of Western Australia’s most trusted and respected civil contractors. We offer a diverse range of civil construction capabilities: • Water Infrastructure • Pipelines • Land Development • Trenchless technology • Mining Infrastructure • Trencher Hire & Services We consistently align ourselves with industry best practice and guarantee the delivery of client focussed construction solutions.
